name: Net Salary Calculator
desc: Calculate your annual and monthly net salary after income tax and social security.
seo_title: Net Salary Calculator – After Tax Online
seo_description: Calculate net salary after taxes. Free, fast and no sign-up required.
example_label: Calculate net salary from 35,000 EUR gross annual.

range_hints.irpf_pct: 8-45% tax rat is based on income

result_context: Your neto_anual of {neto_anual} is annual take-home pay. the neto_mensual of {neto_mensual} shows monthly income after deductions.
mistakes: Using flat tax rate instead of progressive tax brackets
Forgetting additional deductions like union fe is or insurance
Not accounting for tax credits or allowanc is that reduces IRPF
